evidence.snippet:
### Skynode X
The all-in-one solution to power a fleet of
autonomous robots
===============================================================
![](https://i0.wp.com/auterion.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/auterion-skynode-x-min.png?resize=1080%2C206&ssl=1 "auterion-skynode-x-min")
A fully integrated autopilot and mission computer
to enable any drone with the Auterion software platform.
**Now 30% thinner, 15% lighter and with upgraded performance.**

AuterionOS is the only vendor-independent operating system that runs onboard a fleet of interconnected robots.
Included in every Skynode and select partner manufacturers free of charge

items.notes: Skynode X and Skynode S are integrated autopilot + mission computer hardware modules. AuterionOS is the flight/autonomy operating system. Nemyx adds swarm coordination built on AuterionOS.

evidence.snippet:
### Auterion Suite
From flight data to operational intelligence.
---------------------------------------------
Visualize data transferred automatically to the cloud and process information captured during a mission in real time, including flight logs. Benefit from a holistic and scalable fleet management.

### Auterion Mission Control
One interface for every vehicle. Every mission.
-----------------------------------------------
Plan, execute, and monitor operations from a single application — whether you’re flying one drone or coordinating a global fleet.

items.notes: Auterion Suite is a cloud-based fleet management platform; Auterion Mission Control is a GCS/mission planning application.

evidence.snippet:
#### US HQ
4250 Fairfax Dr, Suite 350, Arlington, VA 22203

headquarters.notes: US HQ in Arlington VA; Europe HQ in Munich, Germany. Legal entity is Auterion LLC (US).

evidence.snippet: Skynode X combines a flight controller, a mission computer and LTE connectivity all in one product. It provides seamless integration among components in one single module, that can easily fit into your hardware product, allowing faster go-to-market.

Auterion’s cutting-edge operating system for autonomous computing empowers a diverse range of autonomous robots to perform high-risk to mundane tasks, deliver goods, and aid in life-saving missions.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201080%20608'%3E%3C/svg%3E "auterion-demonstration-team")
Our industry-leading software drives the adoption of robotic fleets and is recognized by the U.S. government as the future standard for its drone program.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primary hardware deliverable is the Skynode X and S modules (autopilot + mission computer), sold to drone manufacturers. AuterionOS, Suite, and Mission Control are bundled/licensed software. Per rubric, selling Skynode boards precludes software_platform classification. Company is evolving toward OEM territory with Nemyx and Long Range strike capability.

items.name: Skynode S
items.product_type: compact chip-down autopilot + mission computer module

evidence.snippet:
### Skynode S
Bring AI and computer vision to small autonomous systems
========================================================
Skynode S is the compact, low-cost, chip-down controller that enables any small UAS system with the Auterion software platform. Featuring a custom designed, powerful mission computer to deploy AI and computer vision applications at scale.

### Introducing Nemyx
Nemyx: coordinated swarms at scale
==================================
Swarm autonomy. Built on AuterionOS. Scalable, mission-focused.

items.name: Long Range One Way Attack
items.product_type: long-range strike drone / autonomy stack for OWA UAS

evidence.snippet:
### AUTERION LR
Long Range One Way Attack – Scalable Deep Strike Capability
===========================================================
Auterion’s Long Range One Way Attack capability delivers precision effects at distances of up to 1,000 miles. Proven in Ukraine and ready for allied deployment, it combines combat-tested hardware with Auterion’s open, software-defined autonomy stack to deliver resilient, scalable strike capability.

items.name: Skynav

evidence.snippet:
**GROUND CONTROLLER**
Skynav
------
Skynav is a light-weight handcontroller that makes it easy to manage autonomous flights, live video streaming, and data collection.

items.notes: Listed on NDAA compliance page as a ground controller product.

evidence.snippet:
**NDAA compliant products**
---------------------------
Auterion and its ecosystem partners provide enterprise and government customers with the following products compliant with the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021

Integrated flight controller, mission computer and connectivity with U.S. Government certifications, hardening, and extensions.
As a US Government certified vendor, we design, assemble and support Skynode in the USA. It is fully compliant with National Defense Authorization Act.

ndaa.notes: Dedicated NDAA compliance page lists Skynode as fully NDAA compliant and assembled in the USA. Also lists ecosystem partner drones (Vector, Scorpion, Vesper) as NDAA compliant.

blue_uas.notes: Skynode S product page includes an image titled 'auterion-skynode-s-blue-uas-cleared' (resource-0010, line 102), and the RTK product page references 'Blue UAS vehicles' as a supported category (resource-0014, line 139). No explicit text claim of Blue UAS clearance found in corpus.

evidence.snippet:
**Now 30% thinner, 15% lighter and with upgraded performance.**
[Request a demo](https://auterion.com/company/contact-us/)
[Contact our sales team](https://auterion.com/company/contact-us/)
Production ramp to hundreds of units per month

readiness.notes: Skynode X and S are catalog products available for purchase. RTK licenses priced at $1,425/vehicle/year. Long Range mentions production ramp to hundreds of units per month.

unresolved_questions: Blue UAS cleared status for Skynode S — image alt text on product page suggests clearance but no explicit text claim found.
tagline: Integrated autopilot and operating-system vendor for autonomous UAS fleets. Skynode X and Skynode S are production flight controllers (both NDAA-compliant; S also Blue UAS-certified); AuterionOS is a vendor-independent onboard OS; Nemyx delivers swarm autonomy; Long Range One Way Attack is a 1,000-mile loitering-munition airframe. Auterion Suite and Mission Control provide cloud fleet management and mission planning. Public evidence supports production status across all product lines; no major contract awards or programs named in open sources.
